title: Directions on the conduct of the appeal proceedings
text: - Considering that it is necessary to examine in limine, before addressing any other issue in the appeals, whether the appeals are admissible and who should make submissions or submit observations on the appeals, (p. 3).

art. 82.1 RS ; appeal ; admissibility of appeal ;  -ID003719
